dsl_rule.translation_notes: Translated Bollinger Band strategy using available bb_upper, bb_middle, bb_lower indicators. Entry conditions: long when price falls below lower band (−2σ), short when price exceeds upper band (+2σ). Exit conditions: exit when price reverts to middle band (moving average), which approximates the ±1σ reversion zone. The exact lookback period and half-life parameters were not specified by the author, so standard Bollinger Band calculation is assumed. Sharpe ratio degradation from transaction costs is noted but not encoded in rules.

source_rule_text: A mean-reverting strategy on ES that enters on Bollinger Band extremes (±2 standard deviations) and exits when price reverts toward the moving average (±1 standard deviation).
